content: SuperAdmin authorization in ASP.NET Core for cross-tenant access: Add 'SuperAdmin' role to Identity. SuperAdmin policy: .RequireRole('SuperAdmin'). At EF Core layer, ITenantService returns null/0 for SuperAdmin, and DbContext uses null-check: HasQueryFilter(e => _tenantId == null || e.GroupId == _tenantId). SuperAdmin sees all tenants without filter. At controller layer, SuperAdmin bypasses group-membership checks. For platform management area (e.g. /Groups area), use [Authorize(Policy='SuperAdminOnly')]. Separate area from /Admin — Admin = per-group admin, SuperAdmin = platform-level. Pattern: check IsSuperAdmin in ITenantService before applying filter, or inject user role into service.
